micro_action.task: Eat a piece of fruit as a snack.

quote.text: I am the greatest, I said that even before I knew I was.
quote.author: Muhammad Ali

micro_action.task: Drink 2 liters of water today.

quote.text: He who is not courageous enough to take risks will accomplish nothing in life.
quote.author: Muhammad Ali

micro_action.task: Try a new strategy or play in practice today.

quote.text: Impossible is just a big word thrown around by small men who find it easier to live in the world they’ve been given than to explore the power they have to change it.
quote.author: Muhammad Ali

micro_action.task: Challenge a limitation you have placed on yourself.

quote.text: The only way to achieve the impossible is to believe it is possible.
quote.author: Charles Kingsleigh

micro_action.task: Visualize your end-of-year goal for 5 minutes.

quote.text: A trophy carries dust. Memories last forever.
quote.author: Mary Lou Retton

micro_action.task: Thank a teammate for being a good friend.

quote.text: If you don't have a dream, you have nothing to work for.
quote.author: Jackie Joyner-Kersee

micro_action.task: Do 10 minutes of extra stretching or drills.

quote.text: Winning is not everything, but wanting to win is.
quote.author: Vince Lombardi

micro_action.task: Give 100% effort in every single rep today.

quote.text: It's not whether you get knocked down; it's whether you get up.
quote.author: Vince Lombardi

micro_action.task: Encourage someone else who is struggling today.

quote.text: If you fail to prepare, you are preparing to fail.
quote.author: Benjamin Franklin

micro_action.task: Pack your sports bag and check your gear twice.

quote.text: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
quote.author: Mark Twain

micro_action.task: Start your warmup 5 minutes early.

quote.text: Whatever you are, be a good one.
quote.author: Abraham Lincoln

micro_action.task: Use 'Please' and 'Thank you' with everyone today.

quote.text: Success is a journey, not a destination.
quote.author: Ben Sweetland

micro_action.task: Reflect on one thing you're grateful for today.

quote.text: Don't count the days, make the days count.
quote.author: Muhammad Ali

micro_action.task: Drink a glass of water before each meal.

quote.text: It always seems impossible until it's done.
quote.author: Nelson Mandela

micro_action.task: Finish a task you've been putting off.

quote.text: Excellence is not a singular act, but a habit.
quote.author: Aristotle (attributed)

micro_action.task: Do your best at one chore at home today.

quote.text: Quality is not an act, it is a habit.
quote.author: Aristotle (attributed)

micro_action.task: Organize your room or desk today.

quote.text: Small deeds done are better than great deeds planned.
quote.author: Peter Marshall

micro_action.task: Pick up 3 pieces of litter today.

quote.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
quote.author: William James

micro_action.task: Compliment a teammate on their effort today.

quote.text: Believe in yourself and all that you are.
quote.author: Christian D. Larson

micro_action.task: Drink 2 liters of water today.

quote.text: Success consists of going from failure to failure without loss of enthusiasm.
quote.author: Winston Churchill

micro_action.task: Smile at a challenge today.

quote.text: The difference between the impossible and the possible lies in a person's determination.
quote.author: Tommy Lasorda

micro_action.task: Have a piece of fruit with breakfast.

quote.text: Most people give up just when they're about to achieve success.
quote.author: Ross Perot

micro_action.task: Finish the very last rep of your training today.

quote.text: Discipline is the bridge between goals and accomplishment.
quote.author: Jim Rohn

micro_action.task: Set your alarm 5 minutes earlier for tomorrow.

quote.text: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
quote.author: Walt Disney

micro_action.task: Take action on a goal today.

quote.text: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
quote.author: Mark Twain

micro_action.task: Drink a glass of water before starting any task.

quote.text: It’s hard to beat a person who never gives up.
quote.author: Babe Ruth

micro_action.task: Keep your head up even if you lose a point today.

quote.text: What you stay focused on will grow.
quote.author: Roy T. Bennett

micro_action.task: Check your progress against your goal from Day 1.

quote.text: Conceive. Believe. Achieve. You have completed the year!
quote.author: Team CBA

micro_action.task: Celebrate your 365 days of mental toughness!
